title: Sem un! Khua hong mial ding hi

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sem un! Khua hong mial ding hi,
Zing dai nom lai in sem
Vai ham-san ciang zong sem un,
Ni- sa sung zong sem un;

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sem un! Khua hong mial ding hi,
A hun bei kong sak kei
Mihing na sep nawn loh hun,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sem un! Khua hong mial ding hi,
Ni kai ciang zong sem un;
Hong taan kik nawn loh ding hun;
Khuamial kuan in zong sem un,
